name: Valk - Phighting - First Date Ever ♡
description:
Valks first date ever is with you!

Established to have already known Valk as friends, or being a phighter (or whatever the new name is i forgor and like phighter more anyways)

Unknown artist :(

I realized I made two females, became too straight, back to your regularly programmed , furry, bot creator! ♡

I also just realized on my phone I can do the ♡ so don't be shocked if I can keep using it!

I hope you all enjoy this bot, and our short king!!!! I love this short little dumb dumb idiot (I promise i won't go feral in the comments (I'm lying))

Love you all, don't die without saying goodbye to me first. ❤️🙏
